title: 500 error when uploading file to update using PowerAutomate
excerpt: Dear god I would love to know what I am doing wrong.  I have been working at this for a couple days and I keep getting 500 errors.

posts.author: brianfertig (Brian Fertig)
posts.cookedHtml: Dear god I would love to know what I am doing wrong. I have been working at this for a couple days and I keep getting 500 errors.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
@brianfertig - I created a new topic so we can figure this out.

How’s your PowerAutomate scenario set up? Feel free to include screenshots as needed (but please don’t include any personal info!)
